meaning: adj.无臂的,无武器的,无扶手的
examples: I pushed my head into her side, an armless hug, a reassuring nudge.
An armless, upholstered chair with a high, straight back and a low seat.
Liu, an armless pianist from Beijing, was named one of the show`s finalists。
Headless and armless, the figure tilted slightly on its stand, as if leaning over to tell a secret.
The headless and armless body of 50-year-old Kevin Kennedy, was found in a shallow grave in Sneinton, Nottinghamshire, on 8 August.
